name: Almost Perfect Pear Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Coat a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray.
Whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, and salt; set aside.
Beat the Egg, Egg whites, brown sugar, and oil in an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
Add honey, applesauce, and lemon rind; beat again. If the pears are not juicy, add a few more tablespoons of applesauce.
Stir in the flour mixture, pears, and raisins by hand just until combined. The batter will be dry.
Scoop the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 40 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. The crust may crack.
Cool in the pan on a wire rack for about 10 minutes. Turn out onto a wire rack and cool completely. Makes 1 loaf.
